narrative:
Tiverton Twp township has 213 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
